mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_PENALTY_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}

${pagingTop} SELECT penalty_idx, homepage_id, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS end_date, penalty_count, penalty_day, use_yn, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS save_date FROM UNTACT_BOOK_PENALTY_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
ORDER BY start_date DESC, end_date DESC ${pagingBottom}

SELECT penalty_idx, homepage_id, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS end_date, penalty_count, penalty_day, use_yn, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS save_date FROM UNTACT_BOOK_PENALTY_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND penalty_idx = #{penalty_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(penalty_idx),0)+1 FROM UNTACT_BOOK_PENALTY_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
INSERT INTO UNTACT_BOOK_PENALTY_SETTING ( penalty_idx, homepage_id, start_date, end_date, penalty_count, penalty_day, use_yn, save_date ) VALUES ( #{penalty_idx}, #{homepage_id}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{penalty_count}, #{penalty_day}, #{use_yn}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE UNTACT_BOOK_PENALTY_SETTING SET start_date = #{start_date}, end_date = #{end_date}, penalty_count = #{penalty_count}, penalty_day = #{penalty_day}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, save_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND penalty_idx = #{penalty_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_PENALTY_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND penalty_idx != #{penalty_idx} AND ((start_date <= #{start_date} AND end_date >= #{start_date}) OR (start_date <= #{end_date} AND end_date >= #{end_date}))
SELECT NVL(MAX(penalty_count),0) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_PENALTY_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND SYSDATE BETWEEN start_date AND end_date
SELECT TO_CHAR(end_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS end_date FROM UNTACT_BOOK_PENALTY_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND SYSDATE BETWEEN start_date AND end_date
